title: Most Docked Stations
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM Docked WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT StationName AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Docked WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY StationName ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} docking event(s) recorded during the report period. Your most-visited stations are your home ports — the Inara link lets you check the current state of the place you keep returning to, whether it's a trading hub, an engineering pit stop, or the home base you always return to after a long run.
details.help: Docked StationName is the destination. total drives the title as the total docking event count.

tagLines: Station docking frequency analysis compiled. Most visited installations noted in the flight record.
The station you dock at most is probably the one that feels like home. The log confirms which one that is.
Some stations are stopovers. Others become anchors. Frequency reveals which is which.
